evidence_quotes.quote: these are games which people had already paid for and are no longer able to play.
Forza Street stopped being playable and ceased to exist,

paragraphs.text: Greetings, you probably might have already heard about the European Citizens' Initiative. It is a consumer rights initiative to try and stop the destruction of video games that continues to happen at a rampant pace, these are games which people had already paid for and are no longer able to play. Personally I never enjoyed when games like Forza Street stopped being playable and ceased to exist, these are games that were extremely enjoyable to play and yet nobody is able to play that game ever again. I just wanted to say that I support this initiative and it would be wonderful if the European Commission could look into it. Best Regards!
